\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
# Benford probabilities (%)
benford <- 100 * probabilities

# Average from the table
average <- c(31.2, 19.3, 12.2, 9.9, 7.6, 6.4, 4.9, 4.6, 3.7)

# Data frame
df <- data.frame(
  Digit = rep(digits, 2),
  Percentage = c(benford, average),
  Series = rep(c("Benford", "Average"), each = 9)
)

# Plot
benford_average_plot <- ggplot(df,
       aes(x = Digit,
           y = Percentage,
           color = Series,
           linetype = Series)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:9) +
  labs(
    x = "First digit",
    y = "Percentage"
  )

benford_average_plot
\end{Verbatim}
\endgroup
